title: Governor Newsom Signs Executive Order Doubling Down on Stateâ€™s Commitment to Clean Cars and Trucks, Kickstarts Next Phase of Leadership
content: Following President Trumpâ€™s signing of illegal Congressional resolutions attempting to roll back Californiaâ€™s clean cars and trucks program and make the state smoggy again, Governor Gavin Newsom today signed an executive order doubling down on the stateâ€™s efforts to transition away from fossil fuels. This action builds on the lawsuit Governor Newsom and Attorney General Rob Bonta filed earlier today against the Trump administration to protect Californiaâ€™s clean air authority. It also follows last monthâ€™s announcement that California and 10 other states launched a coalition to continue advancing clean cars.
author: Analysts Account
